node.description: Root workspace code quality and maintenance checks

tasks.description: Validate all tend profiles and configuration
command: if command -v nix >/dev/null 2>&1; then nix develop .#default --command tend validate --profiles; elif command -v tend >/dev/null 2>&1; then tend validate --profiles; else echo 'Error: tend not available. Install nix and run nix develop first.' >&2; exit 1; fi

tasks.description: Check root Nix files are formatted correctly
Lint root Nix files with statix (skipping submodules)
Find and report dead Nix code in root files
Validate JSON files in the root workspace
command:
files=$(find . -path './flakes' -prune -o -path './.git' -prune -o -name '*.json' -type f -print); if [ -z "$files" ]; then echo 'No JSON files'; exit 0; fi; printf '%s
' "$files" | xargs jq -e . >/dev/null

tasks.description: Format-check QML files when QML files and qmlformat are available
command:
files=$(find . -path './flakes' -prune -o -path './.git' -prune -o -name '*.qml' -type f -print); if [ -z "$files" ]; then echo 'No QML files'; exit 0; fi; if ! command -v qmlformat >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo 'qmlformat unavailable; skipping'; exit 0; fi; printf '%s
' "$files" | xargs qmlformat --check

tasks.description: Format-check Lua files when Lua files and stylua are available
command:
files=$(find . -path './flakes' -prune -o -path './.git' -prune -o -name '*.lua' -type f -print); if [ -z "$files" ]; then echo 'No Lua files'; exit 0; fi; if ! command -v stylua >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo 'stylua unavailable; skipping'; exit 0; fi; printf '%s
' "$files" | xargs stylua --check

tasks.description: Validate locked workspace DAG via stitch graph verify
command: if command -v stitch >/dev/null 2>&1; then stitch graph verify --workspace . --source locks --strict; elif command -v nix >/dev/null 2>&1; then nix develop .#default --command stitch graph verify --workspace . --source locks --strict; else echo 'Error: stitch unavailable for locked graph check. Install nix and run nix develop first.' >&2; exit 1; fi

tasks.description: Run Mix formatter check when an Elixir project is present
command: if [ ! -f mix.exs ]; then echo 'No mix.exs'; exit 0; fi; if ! command -v mix >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo 'mix unavailable; skipping'; exit 0; fi; mix format --check-formatted

tasks.description: Preview which git hooks would be installed across all workspace repos
command: if command -v nix >/dev/null 2>&1; then nix develop .#default --command stitch hooks plan --all; elif command -v stitch >/dev/null 2>&1; then stitch hooks plan --all; else echo 'Error: stitch not available. Install nix and run nix develop first.' >&2; exit 1; fi

tasks.description: Install pre-commit and pre-push git hooks for all workspace repos
command: if command -v nix >/dev/null 2>&1; then nix develop .#default --command stitch hooks install --all; elif command -v stitch >/dev/null 2>&1; then stitch hooks install --all; else echo 'Error: stitch not available. Install nix and run nix develop first.' >&2; exit 1; fi

tasks.description: Run full integration status check (locked graph, status, git-jj-policy conformance)
command: if command -v nix >/dev/null 2>&1; then stitch_flake=.; if [ -d repos/phenix-stitch ]; then stitch_flake=./repos/phenix-stitch; fi; echo '=== Integration Check ===' && echo '1. Locked graph:' && nix develop "$stitch_flake#default" --command stitch graph verify --workspace . --source locks --strict && echo && echo '2. Workspace discovery:' && nix develop "$stitch_flake#default" --command stitch workspace discover --workspace . --json >/dev/null && echo 'workspace discovery: ok' && echo && echo '3. Profile validation:' && nix develop .#default --command tend validate --profiles && echo && echo '=== All integration checks passed ==='; else echo "Error: nix not available. Run nix develop first." >&2; exit 1; fi

missing=0; for f in ROADMAP.md docs/workflow/git-jj-policy.md docs/workflow/workspace-state.md AGENTS.md flake.nix flake.lock .tend.json; do if [ ! -f "$f" ]; then echo "MISSING: $f"; missing=1; fi; done; if [ "$missing" = 1 ]; then exit 1; else echo 'All required docs present'; fi

tasks.description: Verify git/jj workflow policy documentation exists
command: if [ -f docs/workflow/git-jj-policy.md ]; then echo 'git-jj-policy.md: present'; else echo 'MISSING: docs/workflow/git-jj-policy.md' >&2; exit 1; fi
